description: A citizen wants to report a large pothole on a city street using the 311 service.

nodes.task_description: Collect the location of the pothole (address or intersection) and the citizen's contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the location and reporter's details.

nodes.task_description: Create a new service request in the public works management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new service ticket for the pothole repair.

nodes.task_description: Provide the citizen with a service request number so they can track the status of the repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the citizen a tracking number for their request.
